nodes.context: Nigerian confraternity involved in drug trafficking, passport forgery, money laundering, and sex trafficking. Operates in Nigeria and internationally.
Nigerian confraternity-affiliated group, rival of Supreme Eiye Confraternity. Involved in organized crime including human trafficking.

edges.context: Long-standing rivalry with killings of rival members. Between January and June 2024, 24 people were killed in cult-related violence in Ogun State, most attributed to this conflict.
